name: P-MON · Google Ads Budget Monitor v2 — API Live
_changelog: [v2] Remplacement du node mock Code → HTTP Request v4.2 (Google Ads API v19 live)
[v2] Ajout node Parser réponse API (micros → euros, camelCase Google Ads REST)
[v2] API Google Ads v19 (dernière version stable mai 2026)
[v2] Reste (euros) arrondi 2 décimales dans analyser seuils

assignments.name: google_ads_customer_id
assignments._note: ID du compte client Google Ads (sans tirets, ex: 1234567890)

assignments.name: google_ads_login_customer_id
assignments._note: ID du compte MCC (manager). Identique à customer_id si compte direct

assignments.name: developer_token
assignments._note: Token développeur Google Ads API (Google Ads Manager → API Center)

nodes.name: 📡 Google Ads API — Budgets du jour

parameters.jsonBody: { "query": "SELECT campaign.name, campaign.id, campaign_budget.amount_micros, metrics.cost_micros, customer.descriptive_name FROM campaign WHERE campaign.status = 'ENABLED' AND segments.date DURING TODAY ORDER BY metrics.cost_micros DESC" }

_setup.etape_1: Dans n8n → Credentials → New → Google Ads OAuth2 API
_setup.etape_2: Créer un projet GCP → activer Google Ads API → OAuth2 credentials
_setup.etape_3: Developer Token : Google Ads Manager → Outils → API Center
_setup.etape_4: customer_id : Google Ads → coin supérieur droit (format: 123-456-7890 → enlever tirets)

assignments.name: statut
assignments.value: OK — tous les budgets sous le seuil

main.node: 📡 Google Ads API — Budgets du jour
